---
title: "A Pattern Language Index"
author: "Christopher Alexander"
date: "1977"
date-added: "2026-04-15"
categories: [architecture, design, patterns, urbanism]
status: to-read
url: "https://www.patternlanguageindex.com/"
---

A guide to the seminal architecture book by Christopher Alexander.

[Read the full article →](https://www.patternlanguageindex.com/)
